Package com.wip.service

Interface ParcelService

All Known Implementing Classes:
ParcelServiceImpl
public interface ParcelService
Service interface defining the business operations for managing parcel bookings.

This interface provides the contract for creating, retrieving, updating, deleting, and searching parcel records within the courier tracking system. Implementations must enforce role-based access control: non-admin users can only access parcels they have created or that belong to their own customer profile, while administrators have unrestricted access. Deleting a parcel also cascades to remove any associated shipment record.

Since:
1.0
Version:
1.0
Author:
Rohith Varma K

  • Method Details

    • addParcel

      ParcelDto addParcel(ParcelDto parcelDto)
      Creates and persists a new parcel booking using the details from the provided DTO.

      For admin users, the target customer is taken from parcelDto.getCustomerId(). For regular users, the customer is resolved from the authenticated user's own profile. The receiver phone is automatically sourced from the customer's phone number.

      Parameters:
      parcelDto - the data transfer object containing the new parcel's details; must not be null
      Returns:
      a ParcelDto representing the newly created parcel, including the server-assigned parcelId
      Throws:
      ResourceNotFoundException - if the target customer is not found or is not accessible to the current user

    • getAllParcels

      List<ParcelDto> getAllParcels()
      Retrieves all parcel records visible to the currently authenticated user.

      Administrators receive all parcel records. Non-admin users receive only parcels they have created.

      Returns:
      a list of accessible ParcelDto objects; may be empty

    • getParcelById

      ParcelDto getParcelById(Long id)
      Retrieves a single parcel record by its unique identifier.

      Non-admin users may only retrieve parcels they have created; attempts to access another user's parcel will result in a not-found exception.

      Parameters:
      id - the unique ID of the parcel to retrieve
      Returns:
      the matching ParcelDto
      Throws:
      ResourceNotFoundException - if no parcel with the given ID exists or if the current user does not have access to it

    • getParcelsByCustomerId

      List<ParcelDto> getParcelsByCustomerId(Long customerId)
      Retrieves all parcels belonging to the specified customer.

      Non-admin users may only retrieve parcels for customers they created and parcels they themselves booked.

      Parameters:
      customerId - the unique ID of the customer whose parcels are to be retrieved
      Returns:
      a list of ParcelDto objects for the given customer; may be empty
      Throws:
      ResourceNotFoundException - if the customer is not found or is not accessible to the current user

    • updateParcel

      ParcelDto updateParcel(Long id, ParcelDto parcelDto)
      Updates an existing parcel booking with the details provided in the DTO.

      Non-admin users may only update parcels they have created and must specify a customer they own. The receiver phone is re-synced from the customer profile.

      Parameters:
      id - the unique ID of the parcel to update
      parcelDto - the DTO containing the updated field values
      Returns:
      the updated ParcelDto
      Throws:
      ResourceNotFoundException - if the parcel or the specified customer is not found or is not accessible to the current user

    • deleteParcel

      void deleteParcel(Long id)
      Deletes a parcel record and its associated shipment (if any).

      Non-admin users may only delete parcels they have created. If a shipment exists for the parcel, it is removed first to maintain referential integrity.

      Parameters:
      id - the unique ID of the parcel to delete
      Throws:
      ResourceNotFoundException - if no parcel with the given ID exists or if the current user does not have access to it

    • search

      List<ParcelDto> search(String keyword)
      Searches for parcel records matching the given keyword across multiple fields.

      The search is performed in-memory against the parcel ID, customer ID, customer name, receiver phone, source address, and destination address in a case-insensitive manner. Results are scoped to parcels accessible to the current user. A blank or null keyword returns all accessible parcels.

      Parameters:
      keyword - the search term; null or blank returns all accessible parcels
      Returns:
      a filtered list of matching ParcelDto objects; may be empty
